Class RelationshipManager

java.lang.Object
simcli.entities.managers.RelationshipManager
public class RelationshipManager extends Object
Manages all social bonds, interactions, and romantic relationships for a single Sim.

Tracks both a legacy integer-based relationship map (used for quick threshold checks) and a richer Relationship registry that models progression through RelationshipStatus tiers. Also handles marriage, reproduction, and child registration.

Extracted from Sim to follow the Single Responsibility Principle.

    Constructs a new RelationshipManager for the given Sim.

  • Constructor Details

    • RelationshipManager

      public RelationshipManager(Sim owner)
      Constructs a new RelationshipManager for the given Sim.
      Parameters:
      owner - the Sim that owns this relationship manager.

  • Method Details

    • getRelationshipRegistry

      public List<Relationship> getRelationshipRegistry()
      Returns the full list of rich Relationship objects tracked by this manager.
      Returns:
      the relationship registry.

    • getSpouse

      public Sim getSpouse()
      Returns the owner's spouse, or null if unmarried.
      Returns:
      the spouse Sim, or null.

    • setSpouse

      public void setSpouse(Sim spouse)
      Sets the owner's spouse. Used when establishing or restoring a marriage bond.
      Parameters:
      spouse - the Sim to marry, or null to clear.

    • getChildren

      public List<Sim> getChildren()
      Returns the list of children produced by the owner.
      Returns:
      the children list.

    • addChild

      public void addChild(Sim child)
      Registers a new child under this relationship manager.
      Parameters:
      child - the child Sim to add.

    • getRelationship

      public int getRelationship(Sim otherSim)
      Returns the legacy integer relationship score with another Sim.
      Parameters:
      otherSim - the target Sim.
      Returns:
      the relationship score (0 if no prior interaction).

    • getRelationships

      public Map<Sim,Integer> getRelationships()
      Returns the full map of legacy relationship scores.
      Returns:
      a map of target Sims to integer scores.

    • increaseRelationship

      public void increaseRelationship(Sim otherSim, int amount)
      Increases the legacy relationship score with another Sim, clamped to [0, MAX_RELATIONSHIP_SCORE].
      Parameters:
      otherSim - the target Sim.
      amount - the amount to add to the score.

    • interactWith

      public void interactWith(Sim otherSim, SocialAction action)
      Performs a social action with another Sim, updating the rich Relationship model's friendship score and status.

      If no relationship exists yet, a new one is created as RelationshipStatus.STRANGER.

      Parameters:
      otherSim - the Sim to interact with.
      action - the social action to perform.

    • interactSocially

      public void interactSocially(Sim otherSim)
      Legacy social interaction handling — applies need boosts, trait bonuses, and basic relationship score increases. Also delegates to interactWith(Sim, SocialAction) for the rich model.
      Parameters:
      otherSim - the Sim to socialize with.

    • marry

      public boolean marry(Sim otherSim)
      Evaluates and establishes a marriage bond between the owner and the target Sim.

      Marriage requires a relationship score of at least GameConstants.MARRIAGE_THRESHOLD, and neither Sim may already be married.

      Parameters:
      otherSim - the Sim to marry.
      Returns:
      true if the marriage was successful.

    • attemptPregnancy

      public Gender attemptPregnancy() throws SimulationException
      Attempts to conceive a child with the owner's spouse.

      Step 1 of the two-step reproduction process: checks the eligibility rules (must be married, different genders) and rolls a 50% success chance. If successful, returns the randomly determined gender of the baby.

      Returns:
      the Gender of the baby if successful, or null if the attempt fails.
      Throws:
      SimulationException - if the owner is unmarried or the couple is of the same gender.

    • finalizeBaby

      public Sim finalizeBaby(String childName, Gender childGender)
      Creates the actual child Sim from the pregnancy result.

      Step 2 of the two-step reproduction process: receives the baby's name (chosen by the player via the UI) and gender (from attemptPregnancy()), creates the Sim, and registers the child under both parents.

      Parameters:
      childName - the name chosen for the baby.
      childGender - the gender determined during pregnancy.
      Returns:
      the newly created child Sim.
